rationale: The cited paper is used for more than a passing literature mention; it plays a concrete methodological role in the citing meta-analysis. The authors explicitly follow Albers, Mantrala, and Sridhar (2010) for method-bias correction of elasticities and reference its guidance when discussing short- vs long-term elasticity pooling. They also use it as a benchmark for the size of their own elasticity sample. This shows a meaningful transfer of meta-analytic practice into the current study.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Albers, Mantrala, and Sridhar (2010) as a methodological template for elasticity meta-analysis, including bias-correction and robustness framing. It applies those meta-analytic ideas from personal-selling response research to the marketing-firm-value context.
